{{Infobox location
| name = Bastion's Veil
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Bastion's Veil Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]'s [[Veil]] is a powerful, supernatural wall of mist or fog that serves as the primary defense for the [[Consultants]] and their home, the [[Gray Island]]. Created by a renowned [[Soulbound]] named [[Bastion]], the [[Veil]] functions as an impenetrable barrier designed to conceal the [[island]] and protect its inhabitants from the detection and influence of [[Elders]]. Beyond mere concealment, the [[Veil]] possesses suppressive qualities that can dampen sight, sound, smell, and [[Intent]], and it has been used to weaken [[Elders]] in combat. The [[Veil]] is powered by an ancient, highly potent [[Awakened]] artifact—a glass container holding silvery-blue mists that serves as [[Bastion]]'s former [[Vessel]]. Control over this source is a responsibility held by the [[Consultant]] [[Guild Head]], requiring a deep, personal connection to the power. While the [[Veil]] is an extraordinary defense capable of repelling most attacks, it can be manipulated or collapsed by those with sufficient power; for instance, releasing the full extent of its mists can cleanse an [[island]] of [[Elderspawn]] but leaves the area exposed for a period while the [[Veil]] recovers. It is not entirely invincible, however, as it can be breached by certain entities or pushed aside by the direct will of a [[Great Elder]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Soulbound]] has breached [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Located at the edge of the [[Gray Island]], [[Bastion]]'s [[Veil]] appears as a vast pillar of cloud and an ancient wall of gray mist. This fog behaves as though it is held back by a glass barrier, surrounding a secret bay on its fourth side. While [[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] can slide through the mist to reach this hidden area, the [[veil]] also serves as an emergency protocol. When released, the mist acts to cleanse the [[island]] by sweeping all lesser [[Elderspawn]] away, though it eventually vanishes.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a wall of fog that acts as if held back by a glass barrier.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a feature of the [[Gray Island]] that looks like a vast pillar of cloud.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a location with an ancient wall of gray mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A secret bay is surrounded by rocks on three sides and [[Bastion's Veil]] on the fourth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a location that [[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] can slide through to reach a hidden bay.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] stared at [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] at the edge of the [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a mist that can cleanse the [[Gray Island]] of [[Elderspawn]] when released.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] has vanished.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion's Veil]] is an emergency protocol that sweeps all lesser [[Elderspawn]] off the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a wall of mist that usually surrounds the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a cloud of mist that can shroud vessels.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion]]'s [[Veil]] is a regenerating phenomenon on [[Gray Island]] that manifests as a supernatural wall of blue-gray mist. This silvery-blue fog serves to protect the [[island]] from the gazes of [[Elders]] and is produced by the most powerful [[Awakened]] artifact held by the [[Consultant]]. Although its purpose was eventually discovered by the enemy, the mist maintains its ability to shroud the land or even collapse inward. During these shifts in the fog, [[Shera]] was seen emerging from the clouds.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a supernatural blue-gray wall of fog that usually wraps the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] protects the [[island]] from the gazes of [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a wall of mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a regenerating phenomenon on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a product of the most powerful [[Awakened]] artifact in [[Consultant]] possession.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a source of silvery-blue mist that can shroud an [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The purpose of [[Bastion's Veil]] was figured out by the enemy.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Bastion's Veil]] can collapse inward.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] emerged from the cloud of [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Originally, [[Bastion]]'s [[Veil]] served as a protective mist surrounding the [[Consultant]]’s [[island]], an area where the final Guard was eventually pulled. This power possesses a specific [[Intent]] to suppress [[Elders]] and may have been responsible for suppressing [[Kelarac]] during the [[Last Battle of the Empire]]. By the later stages of recent events, the mist has thinned almost to nothing.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a mist that protected the [[Consultant]]’s [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The last Guard was pulled into [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] has thinned almost to nothing.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] has the [[Intent]] to suppress [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a power that may have suppressed [[Kelarac]] during the [[Last Battle of the Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]'s [[Veil]] is a silver-blue light produced by [[Shera's shear]] that creates clouds of mist capable of muffling voices and hiding people from view. This location, which contains a stone pier and serves as the headquarters for the [[Masons]], is associated with a [[Soulbound Vessel]] and provides peace to [[Shera's soul]]. As the world's greatest protection against [[Elders]], the [[veil]] enforces absolute obedience to the Am'haranai leader and once swallowed the [[Emperor’s Stage]]. [[Shera]] can thicken, dive into, or channel energy into this [[construct]], using its power to see through the mist or even cause it to explode over the [[Imperial Palace]]. Although the [[Guild]] operated for centuries without a [[Soulbound]] tied to the location, [[Shera]] can feed it power or dismiss it using only a fraction of her own strength.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">25</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a location that [[Shera]]'s gray clothes are meant for blending into.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a barrier of fog that can muffle voices.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a silver-blue light produced by [[Shera's shear]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] can create clouds of silver-blue mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] can be used to hide people from view.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] enforces absolute obedience to the Am'haranai leader.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] is the greatest protection against [[Elders]] in the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a location associated with a [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] provides peace to [[Shera's soul]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a [[construct]] that [[Shera]] uses to see through mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] has a cool scent.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Guild]] operated without a [[Soulbound]] tied to [[Bastion's Veil]] for centuries.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] swallowed the [[Emperor’s Stage]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a location where the [[Masons]]' headquarters are located.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a [[construct]] that [[Shera]] can thicken.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion's Veil]] is a mist that [[Shera]] can dive into.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The citizens saw the silvery mist of [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] contains a stone pier.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] used [[Bastion]]’s power to see through the mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] is a [[construct]] that [[Shera]] can channel energy into and which can explode over the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] borrowed the vision of [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] to see the battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] used [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] to conceal her figure.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] feeds power into [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] dismissed [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] using a fraction of her power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kelarac]] can provide protections greater than [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“The wall of mist that’s usually around the island,” Calder replied.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Bastion’s Veil?” Shera asked. “Emergency protocol,” Kerian responded. “Sweeps all lesser Elderspawn off the Island.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
